_info: Test payloads for all Patient API endpoints. Copy-paste into Swagger UI or import into Postman.

POST /api/v1/patient/create.description: Create a new patient (no auth required)

POST /api/v1/patient/login.description: Login with mobile + DOB, sets token cookie

POST /api/v1/patient/loginmedicine.description: Login and get assigned medicines in one call

DELETE /api/v1/patient/delete.description: Delete own patient account (requires Patient auth cookie)

POST /api/v1/patient/medicalhistorycreat.description: Add a medical history entry for a patient

requestBody.description: Patient experienced severe headaches lasting 2 weeks

POST /api/v1/patient/condition.description: Create a patient condition (requires auth cookie)
POST /api/v1/patient/condition.notes: status must be one of: STABLE, CRITICAL, RECOVERED

GET /api/v1/patient/condition/?id=1.description: Get patient condition by condition ID

POST /api/v1/patient/condition/medicine.description: Assign medicines to a condition (Hospital only)
POST /api/v1/patient/condition/medicine.notes: timings must be HH:mm format, min 1 max 10 per medicine, min 1 max 20 medicines

GET /api/v1/patient/condition/assignedme.description: Get all medicines assigned to the logged-in patient

POST /api/v1/patient/condition/createpro.description: Create a progress check-in schedule (Hospital only)

requestBody.questions: How are you feeling? Any pain? Rate severity 1-10.

POST /api/v1/patient/condition/createpro.notes: Creates totalOccurrences entries spaced frequency days apart starting from startDate

GET /api/v1/patient/condition/progress?i.description: Get progress entries for a condition (Hospital only)
